query: ok the summary's consolidated, run design-review on it before we go anywhere near the tickets

the committee reached consensus and you've written the summary up. put it through the design review step now, i don't want three agents agreeing with each other to be the only check
run the reviewer pass over that design summary. use the architect agent if there's one available rather than a general purpose one
design-review came back with issues found last time and you fixed them but never re-dispatched. run it again against the updated text

before final approval, get a fresh pair of eyes on the consolidated summary via the design review skill. i want the completeness and yagni checks specifically

can you review the PR i just opened, #482, it's the one adding the webhook retry logic to billing/hooks.ts

does the architecture in src/ingest actually make sense? feels like the worker and the scheduler are doing overlapping jobs and i can't tell if that's deliberate
